questions.question: Which State / UT has associated with a UK-based space agency for flood forecasting?
questions.explanation: The Union Territory of Jammu and Kashmir has associated with a UK-based space agency for flood forecasting.The national space innovation programme (NSIP) is a collaborative effort between the Government of JK, Oxford University, Sayers & Partners (SPL) and D-Orbit. This is expected to help predict fluvial flood risk.

questions.question: Which country has detected huge optical flare in BL Lacertae, an oldest astronomical object?
questions.explanation: The Department of Science and Technology of India has reported that Indian astronomers have detected huge optical flare in BL Lacertae.BL Lacertae is a feeding super massive black hole or blazar. The analysis of this old astronomical object may help to trace the mass of the black hole and the source of this emission.

questions.question: Finance Ministry is to infuse a capital of ……………… into the three state-owned general insurance companies.
questions.explanation: Union Finance Ministry is set to infuse Rs 3,000 crore capital into state-owned general insurance companies, during the current quarter.The cabinet decided to increase the authorised share capital of National Insurance Company Limited (NICL) to Rs 7,500 crore and that of United India Insurance Company Limited (UIICL) and Oriental Insurance Company Limited (OICL) to Rs 5,000 crore each.

questions.question: Mahatma Gandhi National Fellowship (MGNF) programme has been launched by which Union Ministry?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers welfare

answer.label: B
answer.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

questions.explanation: The Union Ministry for Skill Development and Entrepreneurship has launched the Mahatma Gandhi National Fellowship (MGNF) programme.This nation-wide programme has been launched in partnership with nine Indian Institutes of Management across India. It has been launched under the SANKALP (Skills Acquisition and Knowledge Awareness for Livelihood Promotion) scheme.

questions.question: As per the recent statistics, which country is the biggest trading partner of the European Union in 2020?
questions.explanation: As per the recent data from the EU statistics agency Eurostat, China was the biggest trading partner of the European Union.Last year, China overtook the United States as the biggest trading partner of the EU. As per the agency, Britain which is not a part of the European Union at present, was the third-largest trading partner.

questions.question: ‘e-Chhawani portal’, which was making news recently, was launched by which Union Ministry?
questions.explanation: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh launched e-Chhawani portal, which aims to provide online municipal services to citizens across 62 Cantonment Boards.Through the portal, application for renewal of leases, online registration of births and deaths and online application for water and sewerage connection can be made easier. Residents of the cantonment areas can also lodge complaints on civic issues online.

questions.question: Who has been awarded with the Sanctuary Nature Foundation’s “Sanctuary Lifetime Service Award 2020”?
questions.explanation: Theodore Baskaran, a leading Writer, historian, naturalist, and activist has been awarded with the Sanctuary Nature Foundation’s “Sanctuary Lifetime Service Award 2020”.This award has been conferred upon him for his dedicated works in wildlife conservation and for his writings in Tamil – English regarding the same.

questions.question: “Anti radicalism bill” which is seen in the news recently, is associated with which country?
questions.explanation: The “Anti radicalism bill” of France, that aims to strengthen oversite of mosques, schools and sports clubs has been put to vote in the nation’s law making assembly.The bill has been proposed to rid France of radical Islamists and ensure respect for French value. This is considered to be President Emmanuel Macron’s landmark project.

questions.question: ECOPact ready mix concrete has been launched by which company?
questions.explanation: India’s leading cement maker ACC has launched a new low carbon range of ready mix concrete, in order to cut down carbon emissions.This has been named as ECOPact. It has been launched in Mumbai and Hyderabad initially and would be rolled out in the entire country in some time.

questions.question: Who has been elected as the next Director General of the International Solar Alliance (ISA)?
questions.explanation: India nominated Ajay Mathur was elected as the next Director General of the International Solar Alliance (ISA). He succeeds Upendra Tripathy, who has serving as DG since 2017.The Director-General has a four-year term, which can also be renewed for an additional term. Mathur is the chief of the New Delhi-based The Energy and Research Institute, at present.
